subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, the Almighty, the Self-Subsisting, and beareth witness that We answered Muhammad, Our servant, in times past [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو العزیز القیوم و شهد بانا اجبنا محمدا عبدنا من قبل
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
